title: Energizer Alkaline Power AAA Batteries, 24 Pack
features: The safe construction prevents the batteries from leaking during storage, so your batteries are ready to use when you push them.
Economical energy for the people used in your family such as remote controls, torches, watches, toys, etc.
From the manufacturer of the most durable AA batteries in the world: Energizer Ultimate Lithium
description: Product Description Power your devices with long-lasting and reliable AAA Alkaline Power batteries from Energizer—for the expertise you expect at a great value. Energizer Alkaline Power AAA batteries hold power for up to 7 years while in storage, so you have power when you need it most. Keep your family’s everyday devices, like remotes, flashlights, clocks, toys, and more, going with the long-lasting energy of Energizer. Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. If swallowed, promptly consult the doctor. Insert correctly (+/-), do not charge, do not open or throw into fire, do not mix with other types of battery: may explode, leak and cause damage. Box Contains 24 x AAA Batteries See more
